title: Magically Smoky Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A sour and savory Mediterranean dish featuring lamb kebabs grilled to perfection with a hint of smokiness, perfect for curing hangovers. This sugar-free friendly recipe is made with sea salt and grilled on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, sea salt, black pepper, garlic, and oregano.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Transfer the kebabs to a plate and garnish with bay leaves.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional oregano and lemon wedges if desired.
